raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "riht/ jo ta KUNGA Deena irr
leela/ un tohti brecfmiga/ kas
winnu paneſſihs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad arridsan faſka tag
KUNGS: Atgreeſeeteß pee
maunim no wiſſas juhſas Sirdeß/
un (Darrajt) to ar Gawefchanu/
un ar Raudafchann/ un ar No-
schehluu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un faplohfaſt juhſu Sir-
di/ un ne juhſas Drehbeß/ un
atgreeſeeteß pee to KUNGII
juhſu Deewu/ jo winſch irr ſcheh-
ligs un Sirdeſſchehligs / lehn-
prahtigs/ un no leeſaß Schehla-
ſtibas / un turra Noschehluunu
pahr to Launu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ko ſinn/ jaſchu tas atgree-
ſifees/ un winnaim ſchehl buhſ/
un pamettihs weenu Swehti-
fchanu paſkat ſewim par Ehda-
mo-Uppuri un Dſerramo-Up-
puri/ preeſſch to KUNGII juhſu
Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Basiueet ar Basuni eekſch
Zianas/ fiwehttjeet weenu Gawe-
fchanu/ iſſauzect weenu Sapul-
zinaſchanaß Deenu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pulzinajeet tohſ Laudis/
ſwehttjeet to Drandſi / fapulzt-
najeet tohſ Wezzajus/ tafrabjeet
tohſ Behrmius/ un kas Kruh-
tis ſihſch. Laid tas Bruhdgans
eet no ſawa Kambara / un ta
Bruhte no ſawas Bruhtes Kam-
bara.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid tee Preestexi / ta
KUNGA Sullaixt raud starp
to Preeſſch-Naimuu un to Al-
tari/ un faſka: Af KUNGS!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad eeſarſehs tas KUN-
ſawas Semmes pehz / un
ſehs ſawus Laudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS a
dehs / un faſzihs uhs ſaw
Laudim: Raugi/ Es fuhti
jums Labbibu/ un Wihu /
Eſji/ ka juhſ no ta pa-ehti
tohpat/ un es juhſ ne nodoh
wairs par Neewatchanu fi
teem Paganeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es dſihtchu to no C
meta-Puffes tahtu no ju
un aſdſihtſchu to falaltutcha
pohſta Semmē/ winna Wo
prett Rihta Juhru/ un wi
Gallu prett to pakaleju
ru. Un winna Smarfcha fo
uhs Augſchu/ un winna n
Smarfcha uſzeljees/jo winſc
leelas Leetas padarrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne bihſteeß/ ak Sem
preezajees un eſti lihaſmiqa
tas KUNGS irr leeſaß Le
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne bihſteeteeß juhſ Si
ri Lauka/ jo tahs Ptawas T
neſi neſſihs atkat jaunu S
jo tee Kohkt neſſihs ſawus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhſ Behrni no
nas preezajtees/ un lihgſmi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
